recommended.song_name: Theres Gotta Be More To Life

content:
Kelly Clarkson - HeartBeat Song - Piece By Piece 

This is my first Tab, Hope you all like, let me know what you think!

* The very last chorus is just Vocals , Bass and Drum so if you want you can 
play the chords or just opt out.  Also the Chord Bb Minor 7 works fine as just a 
regular Bb Minor Chord as well.

{Intro}
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch] 
This is my heartbeat song and I'm gonna play it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                                 [ch]Ebm[/ch]
Been so long I forgot how to turn it up up up up all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
